result.output:
This is not a medical imaging study; it is a scientific bar graph.

It shows the number of PMNs per field in lung, liver, and intestine across three groups: control wild-type, hemorrhage wild-type, and hemorrhage P-selectin knockout. Hemorrhage wild-type has markedly higher PMN counts in all three organs, with reported significant differences versus the other groups (`p<0.01`).

This is not a medical imaging study; it is a scientific bar graph.

It shows the number of PMNs per field in lung, liver, and intestine across three groups: control wild-type, hemorrhage wild-type, and hemorrhage P-selectin knockout. Hemorrhage wild-type has markedly higher PMN counts in all three organs, with reported significant differences versus the other groups (`p<0.01`).
